positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has deep indigo and gold feathers, rendered in bold, clean lines and stylized patterns reminiscent of Art Deco and psychedelic geometric designs. The background is a nebula swirl of deep violets, electric blues, and mint greens, radiating ethereal light. The composition is symmetrical and highly centralized, emphasizing the owl's strong silhouette. Use strong contrast, flat graphic color blocking, and sharp vector aesthetics. Perfect for an apparel print.
